name: Danel (Adir Yeoshua) Ltd
summary: Danel (Adir Yeoshua) Ltd provides human resources services in Israel. It offers recruitment, placement, and employment services in the areas of employment, nursing, welfare, education, hi-tech, cleantech, biotech, finance, and others; and nursing services, such as nursing law services, private care in hospitals, private care by caregivers, assistance to holocaust survivors and foreign caregivers. The company also operates a social-rehabilitation day club, which provides social and recreational activities for the victims of hostile acts, as well as offers housing, education, employment, and other services. It serves government ministries, public bodies, the defense industries, and private companies. Danel (Adir Yeoshua) Ltd was founded in 1974 and is based in Ramat Gan, Israel.
